lessons.title: File Upload Failed — Incorrect File Path
lessons.context: Playwright's setInputFiles() requires a valid file path. Relative paths work only when the test runner's CWD matches the expected base directory, which varies between local runs and CI. Using absolute paths via path.resolve() eliminates this ambiguity.

problem.error: File upload failed / file not found
problem.cause: Relative path resolves differently depending on where the test runner is invoked

antipattern.description: Using relative file path in setInputFiles()
antipattern.why_bad: Relative paths depend on CWD — works locally but breaks in CI where CWD is different
code: // BAD — relative path, breaks in CI

solution.description: Always use path.resolve(__dirname, ...) to construct absolute paths for file uploads.

lessons.ai_instruction: When generating file upload steps, always use path.resolve(__dirname, 'fixtures/filename') for file paths. Never use relative paths.
